untranslatable_reason: Broadening Wedge pattern detection requires geometric trend line analysis (two diverging upsloping lines) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. Pattern recognition of wedge formations with specific slope and divergence characteristics is not supported by the available indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a technical chart pattern (Broadening Wedges, Ascending) that requires visual/geometric pattern recognition. Entry approximated as upward breakout (close > prev_high). Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source; default reversal condition used (close below SMA_20). Hold period set to 42 days based on source text reference to 4-6 weeks for trend change in bear markets. Average rise of 38% (bull) and 18% (bear) noted but not implementable as entry/exit conditions. Pattern-based signals require specialized pattern detection not available in standard indicator library.
